title: SDM GameStages
description: API for creating a step-by-step progression
body:
This mod adds a similar implementation as in Game Stages only for the needs of the SDM Team. The mod adds a step-by-step progression system. However, it is useless without other mods/addons

Basically, this mod was created to port Stages mods to Fabric


The mod itself does not add anything for regular users and serves as a library for other mods.
